# analyticsadmin Provider

Interact with AnalyticsAdmin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scopes` (List of String) The Google analytics admin scopes. Check <https://developers.google.com/identity/protocols/oauth2/scopes#analytics>
